name: dte-rails-toolkit
description: A general-purpose toolkit of runnable, deterministic Rails checkers — CI-friendly linters that flag the failures that produce no error. A staging home for individual checkers/skills until a category has enough to graduate into its own focused plugin (as the Hotwire checkers did into hotwire-rails-toolkit). Currently ships layer-boundary-lint (Rails layering violations) and rails-test-smell-checker (Minitest + RSpec test smells). Each checker is verified both ways: truthful on a real app and flags a synthetic break.
